## Qaid v0.7.1 — Sebeeta table tweaks

Small refinements to the Sebeeta circular scoreboard.

### Changed

- **Dealer term in Arabic** is now **الشيال** (was الموزّع).
- **Target section moved up** — each team's highest player now sits in two boxes at the top of the table, under a new **Target / تارغت** header (previously below the ring).
- **Dealer badge** (D / ش) added inside the centre circle, alongside the dealer's name.

### Verification

- `npm run typecheck` clean
- `npm test` 237/237 passing
- `npm run build` succeeds
- Verified live in English and Arabic (badge, header, top boxes, RTL)
